validations.name: input_inventory_completeness
validations.evidence: All 16 mandatory inputs present and readable. SHA-256 recorded for all.

validations.name: 51_1_rendering_spec_complete
validations.evidence: 51.1/CLOSURE.md status = COMPLETE (normalized by 51.1R). Rendering spec has governed closed set and static mapping table.

validations.name: 51_1s_canonicalization_complete
validations.evidence: 51.1S/CLOSURE.md status = COMPLETE. Outcome A confirmed. 51.2 gate OPEN against canonical flat files.

validations.name: canonical_flat_files_all_present
validations.evidence: All 4 canonical flat files present with SHA-256 matching 51.1S authority matrix exactly.

validations.name: no_structured_target_state_input_used
validations.evidence: No file from core/, investor/, killer-shots/, or demo-model/ was read or used as input. Only flat canonical files consumed.

validations.name: rendering_conflict_scan_complete
validations.evidence: All 4 canonical flat files scanned for rendering conflicts. Zero conflicts found across all files.

validations.name: alignment_decision_no_in_place_modifications
validations.evidence: Alignment strictness rule applied: zero conflicts found, therefore zero in-place modifications authorized. All 4 demo files unchanged.

validations.name: no_lexical_substitution_required
validations.evidence: None of the 4 canonical flat files contain presenter script phrasing, cue points, or language tied to visual rendering states. No substitution trigger exists.

validations.name: cue_integration_contract_produced
validations.evidence: cue_integration_contract.md defines 4 explicit cue points (CUE-01 through CUE-04) each traceable to governed rendering authority and canonical flat demo authority.

validations.name: no_semantic_drift
validations.evidence: cue_integration_contract.md contains no stronger truth claims than the governed rendering state supports. All RENDER_NONE guidance explicitly forbids inventing absent emphasis states.

validations.name: no_prediction_escalation_trajectory
validations.evidence: CUE-03 explicitly forbids claiming RENDER_NONE means 'program is healthy' or 'no risks exist'. CUE-04 explicitly forbids prediction or escalation language.

validations.name: cue_traceability_complete
validations.evidence: Each cue point carries rendering authority and demo authority references. All 4 cues traceable to governing artifacts.

validations.name: determinism_confirmed
validations.evidence: Identical rendering spec + identical demo artifacts → identical cue sequence. No alternate phrasing branches. Static cue ordering.

validations.name: no_fail_closed_triggers_fired
validations.evidence: All preconditions met: rendering spec complete, normalization complete, canonicalization complete, flat files present, zero rendering conflicts, zero required in-place changes, cue logic is presenter-facing only (no implementation).
